name: HyOrc Corp
business: HyOrc Corporation develops and commercializes clean-energy technologies including green methanol production, hydrogen power systems, and hydrogen locomotive retrofits. It sells to end markets such as shipping, rail, and off-grid power. Revenue is generated from engineering services and equipment sales.

exposures.sentence: HyOrc Corporation ( HyOrc, we, our, or the Company ) is a Wyoming corporation engaged in the research, development, and commercialization of clean-energy technologies designed to decarbonize heavy-duty transport, industrial power generation, and distributed energy applications.
Hydrogen Locomotive Retrofits converting existing diesel locomotives to hydrogen or natural gas fuelled systems.

catalysts.sentence: The Company anticipates that Phase 1 may not become operational until July 2026 or later, subject to permitting, equipment delivery, installation, commissioning, financing availability, and other customary project development risks.

catalysts.event: Convertible loan agreement with GS Capital
catalysts.sentence: In early March 2026, the Company entered into a $150,000 convertible loan agreement with GS Capital.

tamClaims.claim: Europe alone has more than 15,000 diesel locomotives in need of decarbonization.
tamClaims.sentence: Europe alone has more than 15,000 diesel locomotives in need of decarbonization.
